name: com.gameframex.unity.imagecache
description:
GameFrameX Image Cache — Unity remote image download and disk cache package. Downloads images from HTTP/HTTPS URLs, caches them on disk with MD5-based filenames, and loads them as Texture2D. Provides configurable cache path, with extensible support for max disk size and expiry. Docs: https://gameframex.doc.alianblank.com

GameFrameX Image Cache — Unity 远程图片下载与磁盘缓存功能包。从 HTTP/HTTPS URL 下载图片，使用基于 MD5 的文件名缓存到磁盘，并加载为 Texture2D。提供可配置的缓存路径，支持扩展最大磁盘容量和过期时间。文档：https://gameframex.doc.alianblank.com
